metadata.title: Timelines (Revamped)
metadata.description: Successor to darakah's Timelines plugin: Generate a chronological timeline in which all 'events' are notes that include a specific tag or set of tags.

regex.source: .error("Couldn't build a start date for timeline on vertical timeline")
regex.target: .error("无法为垂直时间轴构建起始日期")

name: '插入时间轴事件（元信息）'

regex.source:
text: `Specify the front matter keys used to extract start dates, end dates,
         and titles for the timeline notes. Defaults to 'start-date', 'end-date', and 'title'.`
regex.target: text: `指定用于提取起始日期、结束日期和时间轴笔记标题的元信息键。默认值为 'start-date'、'end-date' 和 'title'。`

regex.source: .setDesc('Tag to specify which notes to include in created timelines e.g. timeline for #timeline tag')
regex.target: .setDesc('指定要在时间轴中包含哪些笔记的标签，例如用于 #timeline 标签的时间轴')

regex.source: .setDesc('When enabled, events will be sorted from old to new. Turn this setting off to sort from new to old.')
regex.target: .setDesc('启用后，事件将按从旧到新的顺序排序。关闭此设置则按从新到旧排序。')
.setDesc(`默认值: div。 可接受的值有: ${acceptableValuesString}`)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Default: on. Adds an element to the editor status bar showing the total number
        of events in the current file. Helpful for vaults with lots of events.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`默认值: 开启。 在编辑器状态栏中添加一个元素，显示当前文件中的事件总数。 这对于包含大量事件的库很有帮助。`)

regex.source: .setDesc('When enabled, linked notes will display as a pop up when hovering over an event in the timeline.')
regex.target: .setDesc('启用后，悬停在时间轴事件上时，链接的笔记将作为弹出窗口显示。')

regex.source:
.setDesc(`Specify the format for the date displayed in the vertical timeline. Check the docs
        for information on acceptable formatting tokens.`)
regex.target: .setDesc(`指定垂直时间轴中显示的日期格式。 请查看文档，了解可接受的格式标记。`)

regex.source: .setDesc('Comma-separated list of frontmatter keys for start date. Example: start-date,fc-date')
regex.target: .setDesc('用于起始日期的元信息键的逗号分隔列表。例如：start-date,fc-date')

regex.source: .setDesc('Comma-separated list of frontmatter keys for end date.')
regex.target: .setDesc('用于结束日期的元信息键的逗号分隔列表。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Comma-separated list of frontmatter keys for title.')
regex.target: .setDesc('用于标题的元信息键的逗号分隔列表。')

regex.source:
.setDesc(`If you are having an issue or have been asked to look at the logs, turn this on to see logs in the console.
        Debug mode will default to off on plugin load and the current value will not be saved.`)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`如果您遇到了问题或被要求查看日志，请启用此选项以在控制台中查看日志。
        调试模式在加载插件时默认关闭，当前值不会被保存。`)

regex.source: .innerText = "Error: your browser does not support HTML canvas"
regex.target: .innerText = "错误：您的浏览器不支持 HTML 画布"
